description: MeetGeek is an AI meeting assistant platform that records, transcribes, summarizes, and analyzes meetings, and provides tools for sharing meeting insights and automating follow-up workflows. It supports web, mobile, browser-extension, and embeddable/API-based meeting capture experiences.
summary: MeetGeek exposes a Bearer-authenticated REST API with an OpenAPI spec, a cloud MCP server at `https://mcp.meetgeek.ai/mcp` authenticated via MeetGeek OAuth, and a local npm-distributed MCP server CLI authenticated with a MeetGeek API key.
